heading: Tracking of benefits
label: 9095 Tracking of benefits
text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary may track the benefits provided, directly or indirectly, to individuals and entities under titles I and II and the amendments made by those titles.February 7, 2014
notes: References in TextTitles I and II, referred to in text, are titles I and II of , , , 713. Title I of the Act is classified principally to this chapter. Title II of the Act enacted, amended, and repealed numerous sections and provisions set out as notes in Title 16, Conservation, and Title 43, Public Lands. For complete classification of titles I and II to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 113–79128 Stat. 658Feb. 7, 2014
amendments: References in TextTitles I and II, referred to in text, are titles I and II of , , , 713. Title I of the Act is classified principally to this chapter. Title II of the Act enacted, amended, and repealed numerous sections and provisions set out as notes in Title 16, Conservation, and Title 43, Public Lands. For complete classification of titles I and II to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 113–79128 Stat. 658Feb. 7, 2014
